title: Consolidate signal declaration
body:
Currently there are a couple of different but similar functions and parser rules
that are used for declaring nets and variables. Consolidate these functions
and parsing rules where possible to remove some duplicated code.

A side effect of this refactoring is that class new statements can be used
as variable initializers as allowed by the standard. E.g.
    
```SystemVerilog
  module test;
    class C;
    endlcass
    C c = new C;
  endmodule
```
    
This previously was not supported for block item variable declarations, but only for class and package properties.
